snippet.title: Wafa Na Raas Aayee Song Jubin Nautiyal Ft.Himansh K,Arushi N, Meet Bros|Rashmi V|Ashish P| Bhushan K
snippet.description:
Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Wafa Na Raas Aayee" in the voice of Jubin Nautiyal, music by Meet Bros, lyrics are written by Rashmi Virag. The song features Himansh Kohli, Arushi Nishank & Rohit Suchanti. The video is directed by Ashish Panda. 
Hit 'LIKE' if you ♥ this song.

Get ready for #WafaNaRaasAayee to pinch your heart and stir your emotions.

snippet.title: OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO | VAARI JAWAN | Rimorav Vlogs
snippet.description:
Watch VAARI JAWAN Music video by RIMORAV VLOGS Presents RI VLOGS


VAMILY finally hum sabke hoge hai 5 Million Subscribers or hum dil se thank you kehna chahta hai aap sabko for the Continuous love and Continuous Support❤️

VAMILY humne song banna shuru kiya tha 2 weeks pehle 

Singer - VAMILY yeh ganna gaya hai RI Dude aur Rukhsar Bandukia ji ne jinhone humara Oh damn and Mere rabba Gaya hai💛 Both are AWESOME!!🤟🏻

Music - VAMILY music humare RI dudy ne banaya hai humesha ki tarah 😍

Mixing and Mastering - VAMILY Maan Taneja ji ne awesome mixing Aur mastering ki hai aur unhone ne humara Oh damn and Mere Rabba ki bhi ki thi🔥

Lyrics - Lyrics RI dudy aur Maine ( Diksha) likhe hai.. we just love writing Lyrics ✍🏻🤩

Recording - Kishan uncle ne humare Stance Studio Mein RI bhaiyan ki Recording ki hai ( Saare sur lagvaye hai matlab koshish ki hai 🤪)

Camera - RI bhaiyan ka humesha se Sapna tha ki voh FILM camera pe shoot kare toh iss leye iss bar humne Sapna pura kiya ❤️😍 Bawa ji ne camera kiya hai matlab Super se bhi upper vala!

Kapde - Mummy aur Mamu thank you so much sapne humare liye itne mast Mast kapde la kar diye! 🤗

Decoration - Muskan didi thank you aapne on the Spot jaha decoration karvana same day Mein mushkil tha aapne kar dikhaya with Ankush Jiju ki help ... you guys are LOVE 🥰

Producer - PAPA ne ganna suneke baad kaha Rishi tu jese ganna shoot karna chahta hai kar main hoon na! Love you papa for that! 🥺❤️

Director - Hum team banakar kaam karte hai VAMILY toh agar kisi ne bhi koi bhi Idea diya ho hum usse bhi Director bolte hai toh iss leye har baar ki tarah hum sab ne milakar iss Music video ko banaya hai toh sab ka yogdaan barabar hai...💕

Helping hands - ThankYou Gupta uncle & Rocky hum sab keleye khane peene ka dyaan rakhne ke leye!🤗

Safety - VAMILY humne sari safety ka dyaan rakha hai during the shoot of song! 😷

VAMILY hum FUDGE ko bhi lana chahte the music video Mein par aapko pata hai na voh kita FRIENDLY hai 😅🐶 ( Love you Fudgiiii) 

 Sanjay thank you for not sleeping during shoot 😂🤗

Or hai yeh hai gaane ke Lyrics keep sharing and keep Loving -


vekh mai be aageya saj daj ke 
Tere piche-piche paj paj ke 

loki mainu tak de menu Raj Raj ke 
Raj raj ke x3
 
Teri akhoon mein koi toh raaz hai
Lage soni jab mere sath 
Yaar menu kehnde gall baat hai
Gall baat hai x3

Oh Tera pyaar mere yaar
Dil chahe baar baar 
Bs ehna hi mai chahuga

Meri mehngi-mehngi car 
Nale paise ne hazaar 
Bs tere pe lutana chahuga

Lak tera lak tera lak matkana 
Dil kare tenu bs takde java
Haye teri haye teri gallan utte 
Dil mera kare bs vaari java x2

Main tah vaari java x3

Mai taan teri hogayi 
Haan teri hogayi
Mai taan teri ho gayi 
Soneyaa.......

Meri gallan utte 
Tu vaari jave
Haye dill diya gallan 
Tenu samajh na aave 

Tu ashique challa
Reh geya kalla
Fer vi hateda 
Mera faddan toh of palla

Tera pyaar mere yaar
Dil chave baar baar 
Bs enha hi mai chahuni aa

Teri mehngi-mehngi car 
Nale paise ne hazaar 
Eh sabh mai na chahuni aa

Lak mera lak mera lak matkana
Dil tera kare bs takde jave 
Haye meri haye meri gallan utte
Dil tera kare bs vaari java


Lak mera lak mera lak matkana
Dil tera kare bs takde jave 
Haye teri haye teri gallan utte
Dil tera kare bs vaari java

Main tah vaari java x3

vekh mai be aageya saj daj ke 
Tere piche-piche paj paj ke 

loki mainu tak de menu Raj Raj ke 
Raj raj ke x3

Lak tera lak tera lak matkana 
Ohhhh...
Haye teri haye teri gallan utte 
Ohhh....


Lak tera lak tera lak matkana 
Dil kare tenu bs takde java
Haye teri haye teri gallan utte 
Dil mera kare bs vaari java x2

Main tah vaari java x3

snippet.title: "PM Sir, Please Make A Phone Call": Arvind Kejriwal On Oxygen Crisis
snippet.description:
Covid-19 News: Prime Minister Narendra Modi met with the Chief Minister of the 10 states worst hit by the deadly second wave of Covid on a day India touched a new record of 3.32 lakh Covid cases and 2,263 deaths in 24 hours. In an interaction that was live on TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal highlighted the crippling oxygen crisis in hospitals in the capital. "Please sir, we need your guidance," Mr Kejriwal said to the Prime Minister.

snippet.title: MUTTON SCRAMBLED EGG | Biggest Scrambled Egg Cooking with Mutton Keema Meat | Lamb mixed Egg Recipe
snippet.description:
Today in our village we cook Scrambled Egg Omelette Recipe by adding boneless mutton meat with egg. We use the big vessel to make this biggest scrambled egg. We also use hand ground masalas to make this egg recipe yummy.

Finally, we eat these eggs with our favorite mutton recipe.

snippet.title: Amit Saini Rohtakiya : Hawa Baji (Official Video) | Priya Soni | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021
snippet.description:
Amit Saini Rohtakiya : Hawa Baji (Official Video) | Priya Soni | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021

Sonotek Music Presents Full Video of New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 Hawa Baji . Another Superhit Haryanvi Song Sung By Amit Saini Rohtakiya. Starring by Amit Saini Rohtakiya, Priya Soni  Music by GR Music. Lyrics are penned by Amit Saini Rohtakiya

#AMITSAINIROHTAKIYA​ #HawaBaji​  #NewHaryanviSongs​ 
#PriyaSoni #Hawabajisong #Haryanavi2021 #Sonotek
#Haryanavi2021​ #SonotekMusic​ #AmitsainiRohtakiya​

♪ Available on ♪
https://gaana.com/album/hawa-baji

Starring :-  Amit Saini Rohtakiya 
Singer :- Amit Saini Rohtakiya 
Lyrics :- Amit Saini Rohtakiya
Female Artist :- Priya Soni 
Music - GR Music (+918708626865)
Mixing & Mastering - GR Music (+918708626865) 
Edit Di :- Parveen $word
D.O.P :- Munish Sharma
Director :- Jeetu G
Producer : SONOTEK 
Label : Sonotek Music
Publicity Design :- Muku Jangra
Co Artist : Joginder Kundu, Sompal Kashyap 
Copyrights : Sonotek Cassettes Company

LOVE !! LIKE !! COMMENTS !! SHARE !! SUBSCRIBE

Like us on Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/SonotekVideo​
https://www.facebook.com/Sonotek-Music-105304197912151
Follow us on Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/sonotekmusic​​
                                            https://www.instagram.com/sonotek_video


Song Lyrics 

 R Tu Muh P Kuch Hai 
Or Piche Kuch Or Hai 
   Do Char Facklanduva Mai
  Chaale Tera Jor Hai  
Bhai Bhai Kehke Seli maar kar Gya   
Ib Saini Dhokebazi Ni ni

Rr Hero Jhal Dat Le Time Kaad Le  Rrr Makha Hawa Baji Niii

Rrr Meri Photova Ne Paad Ke kai Chode Hore hai 
Rrr Kute Apne ilakya MaiRrr Makha  Ghode Hore hai
Amit tt Tu Sidha Hoke Takra Liye Rr Par Jall Saji Nii

Rr Hero Jhal Dat Le Time Kaad Le  Rrr Makha Hawa Baji Niii

Rr badmashi Ki Speech Thodi Makha Kam Diya Kar 
Rr Makha Tadke Badama Gelya Dudh Liya Kar 
Rrr Pani K Tu Bhar K Dram Rakhe se.  
Rrr Gani Hanji Hhanji Ni 

Rr Hero Jhal Dat Le Time Kaad Le  Rrr Makha Hawa Baji Niii

रै तू मुँह पै कुछ है  रै पाछै कुछ और है 
 दो चार फकलंडुआ मै रै चालै तेरा जोर है 
  रै भाई भाई कैहके सिली मार करग्या 
 इब  सैणी धोखेबाज़ी नी 
 रै हीरो झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
 रै मखा हवाबाज़ी नी 
झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै बेटे हवाबाज़ी नी 
 झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै  घणी  हवाबाज़ी नी 

रै मेरी फोटुआ नै पाड़ कै कई चौड़े होरे है 
 रै कुत्ते अपणे इलाक्या मै रै मखा घोड़े होरे है 
अमित तै तू सीधा होकै टकरा लिए  
रोहतकिये  तै सीधा तू  टकरा लिए 
 पर जालसाज़ी  नी  

 रै हीरो झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
 रै मखा हवाबाज़ी नी 
झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै बेटे हवाबाज़ी नी 

रै बदमाशी की स्पीच थोड़ी  मखा  कम दिया कर 
रै मखा तड़कै बादमा गेल्या  दूध लिया कर 
 रै  पाणी के तू भरकै  ड्राम राखै सै  
रै मखा पाणी के तू भरकै  ड्राम राखै सै
   रै घणी हा जी हा जी नी 

रै हीरो झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
 रै मखा हवाबाज़ी नी 
झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै बेटे हवाबाज़ी नी

https://www.facebook.com/SonotekVideo​​​
https://www.facebook.com/Sonotek-Musi...​

Follow us on Instagram - 
https://www.instagram.com/sonotekmusi...​
https://www.instagram.com/sonotek_video​

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 3 | Positive Approach Rakh Yaar
snippet.description:
Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

The next Episode Releases on 28th April, when we reach 9M Subscribers.

Preparing for UPSC is challenging. It tests not only your knowledge but also your patience. It’s really important to maintain a positive approach throughout your preparation. But everyone around Abhilash notices that he lacks a positive approach in his personality, which reflects in his answers too. How will Abhilash cope with it? Will he be able to keep his approach positive?

Participate in the Unacademy Combat, a weekly scholarship test for UPSC SCE. Use code ASPIRANTS2021 to take the test and compete with peers across the country. Top rankers will also stand a chance to get up to 100% scholarship from a pool worth Rs 1 Crore.
Link - https://unacademy.com/combat/a/KSCGY

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Music: Rohit Sharma
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Casting: Ashish Khare & Shiv Chauhan 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao (Acoustry Private Limited)
DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja, Namita Dubey

UPSC fact #87: 23.72% of the total UPSC Aspirants wanted to become IAS officers because they wanted to be called “Babu” so that finally someone will ask them “Mele Babu ne thana thaya?”
-The Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants​ #TVFOriginal​ #LetsCrackIt​ #UPSC​ 

This Channel is owned, operated, and managed by Contagious Online Media Network Private Limited.

#karikkutuned #karikku #musicvideo

Music Composed & Produced by V3K, Kensta & Ross Knowles.

Mixed & Mastered at Glitch Studios.
Album:- "Loop".

snippet.title: India 'shaken by Covid storm' - BBC News
snippet.description:
India has registered a new world record for daily coronavirus infections for the fourth day in a row. 

Almost 350,000 new cases and more than 2,700 deaths were reported in the past 24 hours. 

The Indian capital Delhi has extended its lockdown for another week as Prime Minister Narendra Modi said the country had been shaken by a "storm" and urged people to get vaccinated. 

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#India #Covid #BBCNews

utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h

Baad iske ya jindagi aabad h

snippet.title: Ek Bhutiya Train Ki Sacchi Kahani - Paranormal Story of A Train (Zanetti Train)- AMF Ep 63
snippet.description:
Zanetti train story is a popular Italian urban legend. The story is fascinating. The story tells that  the train left Rome and went through the mountain tunnel in Lombard but it disappeared with the passengers inside the tunnel. It is one of the best paranormal stories.

Let us explore the story in this episode of AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) series.

AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) is a mini knowledge series by Rajesh Kumar AKA FactTechz where we explore various amazing facts related to our amazing world. Know how enigmatic and astonishing our world is! This is the episode 63 of AMF.

Enjoy the show!

snippet.title: Mi 11 Ultra Unboxing & First Look - True Ultra Flagship SuperPhone - Giveaway🔥🔥🔥
snippet.description:
Enter here: https://gleam.io/YPfBy/tg-mi-11-ultra-giveaway
Namaskaar Dosto, is video mein maine aapse baat ki hai Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra 5G Smartphone ke baare mein aur share ki hai kuch details isi Mi 11 Ultra Smartphone ke baare mein aur saath hi isi Mi 11 Ultra ki ek Unboxing aur details share ki hai. Mi 11 Ultra ek flagship phone hai Xiaomi ki taraf se jaha hai 6.81" ka WQHD+ AMOLED 120Hz Display, Mi 11 Ultra 5G mein hai ek Triple Camera setup 50MP Primary Camera + 48MP Ultrawide Camera + 48MP 5x Zoom (120x Zoom) Camera ke saath mein. Mi 11 Ultra 5G mein hai 20MP Selfie Camera aur power ke liye hai liquid cooled Qualcomm Snapdragon 888 5G Processor, aur saath mein 8GB/12GB RAM LPDDR5 RAM aur 256GB/512GB UFS3.1 Storage aur saath mein 5000mAh ki Battery 67W wired/wireless charging ke saath mein jaha 10W reverse wireless charging bhi available hai. Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra 5G Smartphone mein hamare paas hai WiFi 6E, 5G multilink aur NFC option bhi available hai. Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra phone aap mein se kisi ek lucky viewer ko milne waala hai. Mujhe umeed hai ki aapko Mi 11 Ultra 5G ki yeh unboxing video pasand aayegi.   

Mi 11 Ultra Price in India: 
12GB + 256GB = 69,999INR

snippet.title: Jhoom - Episode 3 | The Fight is On (F2F) | Marathi Webseries | @Bira 91 Merch Store #bhadipa

Gaurav and his friends have escaped from the clutches of Gangadhar but what surprise awaits when they return? Will Gangadhar let them go or will the drama now reach a higher level? Watch this episode to find out! 
Jhoom is our new web series that takes you on a twisted journey of youth, fate, family, friends and chaos. Join along for this fun ride as we release a New Episode, every Sunday. Subscribe to BhaDiPa to get alerts on our new videos! शास्त्र असते ते !

mr.title: झूम - भाग ३ | भीड तू (एफ२एफ) | मराठी वेबसिरीज | #bhadipa
mr.description:
गौरव आणि त्याचे मित्र निसटले आहेत गंगाधरच्या तावडीतून पण परत आल्यावर कोणता गोंधळ करणार त्यांचं स्वागत? गंगाधर त्यांना सोडून देणार का आता हे प्रकरण जाणार एक पाऊल पुढे? जाणून घेण्यासाठी हा भाग शेवटपर्यंत पाहा! 
झूम ही आमची एक नवीन वेब सिरीज आहे. मित्र, कुटुंब, आणि गडबड-गोंधळ ह्या सर्वांनी भरपूर असा हा अनुभव नक्की घ्या. घेऊन येत आहोत एक नवीन भाग  प्रत्येक रविवारी. म्हणूनच #भाडिपा ला सबस्क्राईब करा. 

श्रेयावली- 

कलाकार-
आई - विभावरी देशपांडे
बाबा - सुनील अभ्यंकर
छोटा गौरव - अर्णव कल्कुंद्री
ईशा - तृष्णा चंद्रात्रे
गौरव - गंधर्व गुळवेलकर
गणेश - दिव्य खरनारे
मुकुंद - केतन विसल
गंगाधर - गणेश माने
कुलकर्णी काका - धनंजय सरदेशपांडे
सावंत आजी - हेमा राघू
मिसेस कारखानीस - संपदा देवधर
धुमाळ - अमित कोडे
बायको वी.ओ. - सविता प्रभुणे

दिग्दर्शन - ओमकार जाधव, अभय राऊत
निर्माते - सारंग साठये,पॉला मॅग्लेन, अनुषा नंदकुमार
नाटक आणि कथा - वरुण नार्वेकर
पटकथा - सई हवल, प्राची हंकारे
संवाद - वरुण नार्वेकर, सई हवल, प्राची हंकारे
एक्झिक्युटिव्ह प्रोड्युसर - प्राजक्ता सालबर्डे
छायाचित्रण संचालक - चैतन्य पुराणिक
संकलन - अनुजा भंडारे
सोऊंड डिझाईन, सिंक साऊंड आणि मिक्स - सौरभ मोरगावकर, झमीर तांबोळी  
रंगभूषा आणि वेशभूषा - आशिष हेमंत देशपांडे
संगीत दिग्दर्शन - ए. व्ही. प्रफुल्लाचंद्र
कला दिग्दर्शन - मयूर पवार, अक्षय आंबेडकर
कलरिस्ट: कुणाल तिवारी
ब्रँड आणि सेल्स हेड - स्वानंद तेंडुलकर
पहिला सहाय्यक दिग्दर्शक - राजीब रावल
सहाय्यक दिग्दर्शक - अभिप्राय कामठे, पृथ्वीराज चव्हाण
लाईन प्रोड्युसर - तेजस लिमये
प्रोडक्शन असिस्टंट - रोहन खरे
पहिला एसी आणि फोकस पुलर - बडे कृष्णा
कास्टिंग - ओमकार जाधव, अभय राऊत
लोगो डिझाईन टायटल ऍनिमेशन आणि वी.एफ.एक्स. - इंविमोल्ड पिक्चर्स
वेशभूषा सहाय्यक - हर्षदा आंबेडकर
रंगभूषा सहाय्यक - उमेश जाधव
क्रिएटिव्हस् - प्राजक्ता नेवाळकर
फायनान्स आणि अकाऊंटस्- आदित्य देसाई
बी. टी. एस. - ओमकार कुडाळे
टीम सॅनीटायझेशन - पार्थसारथी वडगावकर
वी.एफ.एक्स. टीम - प्रतीक उमाळे, जयराज वारती
स्पॉट - संतोष मांपेडी, प्रवीण तरी
केटरिंग - हॉटेल ग्रीन सिग्नल, पुणे
लोकेशन - शिवनगरी सोसायटी, पुणे
लोकेशन करटसी - पराग आणि सुप्रिया वडगावकर
उपशीर्षक - प्राची हंकारे
ट्रान्सपोर्ट - सागर राऊत, स्वप्नील भोसले
कॅमेरा वेंडर - अकॉर्ड एक्विप, पुणे
कॅमेरा अटेंडेंट - नागेश शिंदे, जितेंद्र सिंग
लाईट वेंडर - आयडीयल सिने इक्विपमेंट्स
लायटिंग टीम - बंटी साळुंखे, पप्पू साळुंखे, महादेव शिंदे, योगेश वानरे, दीपक राजपूत
प्रॉप मॅन - नितीन आर्ट्स, उमेश मुळे
ग्राफिक डिझाइन - व्हिजन ग्राफिक्स
कला टीम - रशमिकांत सलावी, अंकुश मालेकर, महेश कुऱ्हाडे, सचिन चासकर, अमोल कानडे, राजकुमार शर्मा, रामहारक विश्वकर्मा
सोशल मीडिया टीम - अनिकेत जाधव, पूजा परब, तन्वी कुलकर्णी, रीचा जावळेकर

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong: The Titanic MonsterVerse Clash | #CSKvsRCB | #TheMummyReturns | Ashwin | #IPL2021
snippet.description:
On today's episode of Mummy Returns, we see the preview for CSK vs RCB. We have Indian Cricketer Abhinav Mukund and Stand up comedian Praveen Kumar answer questions from fans, pick their impact players of the day and match up of the day. We also have PDogg join us in the end for a new segment, 'Indha Padayappa moochu ninnu pochu' where PDogg, as Aaru Padayappan, makes 6 predictions ahead of today's game.


Click the Below Duration to watch a specific segment

👉 00:00 - Introduction
👉 00:20 - Stay home, stay safe
👉 03:11 - Valimai Update
👉 08:14 - En Iniya Paans

👉 23:05 - The Master Battle: Match Up of the Day
👉 29:00 - 'Indha Padayappan Moochu ninnu pochu' with PDogg
👉 33:36 - Conclusion

snippet.description:
കേരളത്തിന്റെ വിവിധ ഭാഗങ്ങളിൽ നിന്ന് വാങ്ങിയ, 125 മുതൽ 250 വർഷം വരെ പഴക്കമുള്ള വീടുകളും എട്ടുകെട്ടുകളും വൈക്കത്തിനടുത്ത് ഒരു ദ്വീപിൽ സന്തോഷ് കുളങ്ങര പുനഃസ്ഥാപിച്ച കഥ കേൾക്കുക.. A Story of Kerala Palace

കേരളത്തിന്റെ വിവിധ ഭാഗങ്ങളിൽ നിന്ന് വാങ്ങിയ, 125 മുതൽ 250 വർഷം വരെ പഴക്കമുള്ള വീടുകളും എട്ടുകെട്ടുകളും വൈക്കത്തിനടുത്ത് ഒരു ദ്വീപിൽ സന്തോഷ് കുളങ്ങര പുനഃസ്ഥാപിച്ച കഥ കേൾക്കുക.. A Story of Kerala Palace 
Part 1: https://youtu.be/6h8M2_HZ8uw

Follow me on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/baijunnairofficial
Instagram: www.instagram.com/baijunnair
Email:baijunnair@gmail.com   

വാർത്തകൾക്കും ടെസ്റ്റ് ഡ്രൈവ് റിപ്പോർട്ടുകൾക്കുമായി ഞങ്ങളുടെ വെബ്‌സൈറ്റ് സന്ദർശിക്കാം: http://www.smartdrivemag.com

#SanthoshGeorgeKulangaraInterview #SafariChannelMalayalam #SafariTvMalayalam #Sancharam #BaijuNNair #MalayalamAutoVlog #TravelStories #KeralaHeritageCentre #KeralaPalace

And you deserve someone better

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Episode 906 | 24th April, 2021
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 906: The Business Competitor
------------------------------------
 A man comes to Bhide's house asking after his Papad business. Very enthusiastically they show him all the Papads they sell. Finally, after listening to all the details the man reveals to them that he simply came there to know the rates of the Papads for the business his daughter has started.
 
About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
tags: Tarak Mehta ka ooltah chashmah funniest episode ever

snippet.title: Thee Veeran | Hiphop Tamizha Documentary
snippet.description:
Narrated by Hiphop Tamizha, this documentary sheds light upon the life of Tamil Nadu Fire Fighters of India. This voyage has changed our perspective on life. At dire times like this, amidst the pandemic, we wish this effort of ours will sow seeds of hope upon the barren souls who are feeling downcast. There is always hope if we know where to look for. In our case, we found that in our year-long journey filled with Passion, Bravery and Sacrifice. Witness the journey unfold.

Writer-Director - Hiphop Tamizha
Music Producer by  HiphopTamizha
Executive Producer - Ashwanth
Singer - Nivas 
Background Score Programming - Fazil sha

snippet.title: Drone images of mass cremations as India battles Covid-19
snippet.description: With a rising death toll in a second wave of the coronavirus pandemic, authorities in India have been forced to hold mass cremations at makeshift sites. The country has seen more than 16 million confirmed cases since the pandemic began.

snippet.title: As Modi govt faces up to Covid disaster, BJP learns a tough truth — the virus doesn’t vote
snippet.description:
#NationalInterest #CovidVaccines #Modi
Till February this year, Narendra Modi and the BJP were congratulating themselves on having avoided the tsunami of Covid. In this episode of #NationalInterest, Shekhar Gupta explains the three instances of change that made Modi realise a tough truth — the virus doesn’t vote.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: THE CONJURING: THE DEVIL MADE ME DO IT – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
True horror returns. Based on the case files of Ed and Lorraine Warren. #TheConjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It, in theaters and HBO Max June 4.
 
https://www.facebook.com/TheConjuringMovie
https://twitter.com/TheConjuring
https://www.instagram.com/theconjuring
https://www.theconjuringmovie.com
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” reveals a chilling story of terror, murder and unknown evil that shocked even experienced real-life paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren. One of the most sensational cases from their files, it starts with a fight for the soul of a young boy, then takes them beyond anything they’d ever seen before, to mark the first time in U.S. history that a murder suspect would claim demonic possession as a defense.
 
Vera Farmiga and Patrick Wilson return to star as Lorraine and Ed Warren, under the direction of Michael Chaves (“The Curse of La Llorona”). The film also stars Ruairi O’Connor (Starz’ “The Spanish Princess”), Sarah Catherine Hook (Hulu’s “Monsterland”) and Julian Hilliard (the series “Penny Dreadful: city of Angels” and “The Haunting of Hill House”).
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” was produced by James Wan and Peter Safran, who have collaborated on all the “Conjuring” Universe films. Chaves directed from a screenplay by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick (“The Conjuring 2,” “Aquaman”), story by James Wan & David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick, based on characters created by Chad Hayes & Carey W. Hayes. Serving as executive producers were Richard Brener, Dave Neustadter, Victoria Palmeri, Michael Clear, Judson Scott and Michelle Morrissey.
 
The behind-the-scenes creative team reunited “Conjuring” Universe contributors, including director of photography Michael Burgess, production designer Jennifer Spence, costume designer Leah Butler and composer Joseph Bishara, along with the director’s editor from “The Curse of La Llorona,” Peter Gvozdas, and editor Christian Wagner (“Furious 7”).
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” is the seventh film in the “Conjuring” Universe, the largest horror franchise in history, which has grossed more than $1.8 billion worldwide. It includes the first two “Conjuring” films, as well as “Annabelle” and “Annabelle: Creation,” “The Nun,” and “Annabelle Comes Home.”
 
New Line Cinema presents An Atomic Monster/A Peter Safran Production, “The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It.” It will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures. The film opens in theatres and IMAX nationwide on June 4, 2021 and will be available on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release. The film is rated R for terror, violence and some disturbing images.

One of the most sensational cases from their files, it starts with a fight for the soul of a young boy, then takes them beyond anything they’d ever seen before, to mark the first time in U.S. history that a murder suspect would claim demonic possession as a defense.
 
Vera Farmiga and Patrick Wilson return to star as Lorraine and Ed Warren, under the direction of Michael Chaves (“The Curse of La Llorona”). The film also stars Ruairi O’Connor (Starz’ “The Spanish Princess”), Sarah Catherine Hook (Hulu’s “Monsterland”) and Julian Hilliard (the series “Penny Dreadful: city of Angels” and “The Haunting of Hill House”).
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” was produced by James Wan and Peter Safran, who have collaborated on all the “Conjuring” Universe films. Chaves directed from a screenplay by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick (“The Conjuring 2,” “Aquaman”), story by James Wan & David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick, based on characters created by Chad Hayes & Carey W. Hayes. Serving as executive producers were Richard Brener, Dave Neustadter, Victoria Palmeri, Michael Clear, Judson Scott and Michelle Morrissey.
 
The behind-the-scenes creative team reunited “Conjuring” Universe contributors, including director of photography Michael Burgess, production designer Jennifer Spence, costume designer Leah Butler and composer Joseph Bishara, along with the director’s editor from “The Curse of La Llorona,” Peter Gvozdas, and editor Christian Wagner (“Furious 7”).
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” is the seventh film in the “Conjuring” Universe, the largest horror franchise in history, which has grossed more than $1.8 billion worldwide. It includes the first two “Conjuring” films, as well as “Annabelle” and “Annabelle: Creation,” “The Nun,” and “Annabelle Comes Home.”
 
New Line Cinema presents An Atomic Monster/A Peter Safran Production, “The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It.” It will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures. The film opens in theatres and IMAX nationwide on June 4, 2021 and will be available on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release. The film is rated R for terror, violence and some disturbing images.

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 23 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.description:
Coronavirus In Delhi: राजधानी Delhi में Corona संक्रमण की रफ्तार तेजी से बढ़ती जा रही है. यहां शनिवार को बीते 24 घंटे में Corona के 24,103 नए मामले सामने आए. चिंता की बात ये रही बीते 24 घंटे में Delho में रिकॉर्ड 357 मौतें हुईं. ये अब तक का सबसे बड़ा आंकड़ा है. इतना ही नहीं, Delhi में पॉजिटिविटी रेट भी बढ़कर 332.27% हो गया. फिलहाल राजधानी में 93,080 मरीजों का इलाज चल रहा है.

snippet.title: Hela Ki Prema | Odia Full Song | Sailendra | Jasmine | Humane | Aseema | Asad Nizam | Smruti R
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Song of Hela Ki Prema an Odia Album. Hela Ki Prema Stars Sailendra Samantray, Jasmine Rath and Deepak. Hela Ki Prema is under the Banner of Amara Muzik. Produced by Naveen Bhandari, Directed by Smruti R and Music Directed by Asad Nizam. Amara Muzik is the official Music Label of Hela Ki Prema.

Song Credits:
Hela Ki Prema
Singer: Humane Sagar, Aseema Panda
Lyricist: Arun Mantri
Music Director: Asad Nizam
Flute : Abhiram Nanda
Percussion: Tula Bhai Manish Nanda
Guitar : Asad Nizam

Video Credits:
Director : Smruti R
Starring: Sailendra,Jasmine and Deepak
Executive Producer: Kabita Patra
DOP : Biswajit Kuldi
Lyrical Video: Nowshath Hussain
Editor : Chikun
Poster publicity: Sibajee
DI: Biswajeet Swain

Art Director: Nabaghana Dalai

Apple Music : https://apple.co/32IZ3mq
Resso : https://m.resso.app/ZSJBMfK6Y/
Youtube Music : https://youtu.be/GTVCkc90wls

Lyrics:
Chaluni aaji mu chale bata
Duniya Laguchi mote choto
Kholuni aaji mu moro otha
Kiye se kejani gaye geeta
Akasha ta, mati sathe, mise jouthi 
Mana moro, haji gala, seithi
Sapana ku, Aakhi Basi, khoje jouthi
Nida Moro, Haji Gala, Seithi
Emiti hela mo, jibane Prathama
Kahi de, kahi de, hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Kiye Dela mote chuin 
Nija bhitare mu nahi
Sabu kichi, lagila Mote bhala
Jani parilini Kehi, Ete Ranga Boli hei
Kete bele, futile ae, phula
Faguna ta, phula saathe, gape jouthi
Gapa Basi, Lekhili Mu, Seithi
Bhanra ta, gunu gunu, Gaye jouthi
Pada moro, nachi jaye, seithi
Emiti hela mo, jibane Prathama
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Nija Naa moro kahin, mane aaji padu nahi
Kehi jadi, pachare rahe tuni
Bhabe sina gote katha 
Kahe aau gote katha
Kala ae, hrudaya beimani
Hrudaya ta, chati tale, thaye jouthi
Lucheili, tate nei, seithe
Bhabana ta, hei jaye, sata jouthi
Mote Khoji, paili mu, seithi
 Emiti hela mo Jibane Prathama
Kahi de kahi de hala ki prema
Kahi De kahi de hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1228 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
In a shocking turn of events, Harman confesses the truth and reveals his true identity in front of his family. Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: क्या सब जान जाएंगे Sundar के इस Avatar का Raaz? | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Anokhe Avatar
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Watch Anokhe Avatar clips of your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7bazgTn3zyRg2wlOBQ0GVfQ

Watch these special Avatars of your favorite characters from Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah!

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: 
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Watch Anokhe Avatar clips of your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7bazgTn3zyRg2wlOBQ0GVfQ

Watch these special Avatars of your favorite characters from Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah!

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: 
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

How To Beat Your Addiction?
How To Quit Any Addiction?
नमस्ते दोस्तों!
The Ranveer Show हिंदी के 31st Episode में आप सभी का स्वागत है। आज के Podcast में हम बात करेंगे Addictions की। हम सभी जानते हैं कि कोई भी चीज़ Limit में लो तो Medicine और Addiction की तरह लो तो Poison बन जाती है। आज के समय में 46% से भी ज़्यादा भारतीय अलग-अलग तरह के Substance Abuse का शिकार हैं और 80% से भी ज़्यादा लोगों के Suicide करने का Reason होता है Substance Abuse. ऐसे में क्या Substance Abuse Safe है? क्या लोगों को Alcohol, Drugs, जैसी चीज़ों का इस्तेमाल करना चाहिए?
एक समय की बात है जब मैं भी Substance Abuse का शिकार हो चुका था। 
जानिए कैसे अलग-अलग Addictions ने मेरे Career, Relationships, Exams, Business और Creativity पर असर किया और कैसे मैं एक Addict से Teetotaller बना। 
ऐसे में कैसे मैंने इनका सामना किया और अपने Addictions को Overcome करके अपने Motivation को Restore किया जानने के लिए इस खास Addiction Motivation Podcast को आखिर तक ज़रूर देखें सिर्फ और सिर्फ आपके Favourite BeerBiceps Hindi Channel Ranveer Allahbadia पर।

#addiction #alcohol

About :

Ranveer Allahbadia एक Self Improvement और Self Help Channel है।
हमने Channel की शुरुआत Fitness और Health Videos से की थी।
फिर धीरे-धीरे हमने Fashion, Grooming, Personal Finance, Etiquette, Meditation, Mental Health, Communication Skills और Entrepreneurship जैसे Topics पर भी ढ़ेर सारे Videos बनाए।

आज Ranveer Allahbadia Channel पर नए भारत का नया Podcast The Ranveer Show हिंदी या TRS हिंदी भी Available है।
एक ऐसा Show जहाँ हम आपके साथ Share करते हैं ढ़ेर सारे Success Stories और हर Success के पीछे छुपे Success Secrets. 
#TheRanveerShow का हर Conversation होता है Intellectual, Deep और Informational.
Entrepreneurs हो या Bollywood Stars से लेकर Athletes तक हर कोई हमारे Podcast का हिस्सा रह चुका है। हमारे Podcast का हर एक Conversation आपको देगा Extreme Learning Experience.

snippet.title: ಟಿಟಿ ವಾಹನದ ಚಾಲಕನಿಗೆ ಲೇಡಿ ಪಿಎಸ್​ಐ ಬಿಸಿ ಬಿಸಿ ಕಜ್ಜಾಯ | ರಸ್ತೆಗೆ ಬಂದವರಿಗೆ ಹಿಗ್ಗಾಮುಗ್ಗಾ ಬಾರಿಸಿದ ಪೊಲೀಸರು
snippet.description:
ಟಿಟಿ ವಾಹನದ ಚಾಲಕನಿಗೆ ಲೇಡಿ ಪಿಎಸ್​ಐ ಬಿಸಿ ಬಿಸಿ ಕಜ್ಜಾಯ | ರಸ್ತೆಗೆ ಬಂದವರಿಗೆ ಹಿಗ್ಗಾಮುಗ್ಗಾ ಬಾರಿಸಿದ ಪೊಲೀಸರು 

ರಾಮನಗರದ ಐಜೂರು ವೃತ್ತದ ಬಳಿ ಟಿಟಿ ವಾಹನದ ಚಾಲಕನಿಗೆ ಪೊಲೀಸರಿಂದ ಗೂಸಾ. ಚೆಕ್ ಪೋಸ್ಟ್ ಬಳಿ ಅತೀ ವೇಗವಾಗಿ ಬಂದಿದ್ದಕ್ಕೆ ಬಿಸಿ ಬಿಸಿ ಕಜ್ಜಾಯ ನೀಡದ ಪೊಲೀಸರು.. ರಸ್ತೆಗೆ ಬಂದವರಿಗೆ ಹಿಗ್ಗಾಮುಗ್ಗಾ ಬಾರಿಸಿದ ಪೊಲೀಸರು

snippet.title: STHIRA CHETANA - Dr. Rajkumar Lives On
snippet.description:
STHIRA CHETANA is a psycho-socio-cultural analysis of the legacy of the Kannada film hero – Dr.Rajkumar.

This documentary explores 3 main visible metaphors of Dr.Rajkumar – the statues, his Smaraka (tombstone memorial) and a character who has taken on the persona of Rajkumar.

Releasing on the birth anniversary of Dr.Rajkumar. STHIRA CHETANA is a unique attempt at studying this Kannada film star’s evergreen legacy and his influence on his fans, who he adoringly called “Abhimaanigala Devarugalu”.

Cinematography:
Akshay Surendran
Vaishnav Prabat Rao 
Arun Chalil 

Post Production:
Naveenkumar B Chikkabasuru 

Script:
N .Sandhya Rani  

Narration:
Badekilla Pradeep 

Production Associates:
Rajath Kachinthay 
Vrushal S
Hemanth 

Direction:
Naveenkumar B Chikkabasuru 
Sandeep Sudhakaran

Concept:
Maya Chandra 

Team PRK:
Satish V 
Badarinath Venkatesh 

Special Thanks to:
TS Nagabharana
Dr.K Y Narayanaswamy 
N R Ramesh 
Dr.Soumya Krishna 
Shivakumar 
Rajharsh Solabakkanavar - Shilpa Kala Kutir, Shiggaon
Vedarani P Dasanur - Utsav Rock Garden, Shiggaon
Ashok Basti

Mahadevappa 

This film was made possible with the overwhelming support of many Abhimaani Devarugalu.

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 209
snippet.description:
Ragini wants the family members to work in the party organized by her. Later in the party, she announces that Durga Prasad is going to hand over his company to her.

#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bwL5H8eIQ6w51VWKyjzA0oU

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 - Ep 12 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 23rd Apr 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 - Ep 12 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 23rd April 21

Your favourite Pakistani dramas are just a click away! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to never miss a video from our amazing YouTube channel that is now available in the USA https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher

Composer: Naveed Nashad

snippet.title: Day 9 - Manas Mandir | Ram Katha 843 - Rajula | 25/04/2021 | Morari Bapu
snippet.description:
#MorariBapu​ #RamKatha​ #Rajula​

Day 1 to 3: 14th March - 16th March 2020
Day 4 to 9: 20th April - 25th April 2021

(Morari Bapu’s Ram Katha in Rajula had been postponed after Day 3 in 2020 due to the coronavirus pandemic)

Katha Chaupai:

पुनि मंदिर महँ बात जनाई । आवत नगर कुसल रघुराई ॥
puni mandir maha baat janaai | aavat nagar kusal raghuraai ||

उत्तरकाण्ड - दोहा ३
Uttar Kand - Doha 3

कृपासिंधु जब मंदिर गए। पुर नर नारि सुखी सब भए ॥
kripasindhu jab mandir gae | pur nar naari sukhi sab bhae ||

उत्तरकाण्ड - दोहा १०
Uttar Kand - Doha 10

Lyrics -
Jab dekhya pehli baar tere te pyar tere te ho gaya re,
Yo toot na jave sapna sa yo soch ferrer te te so gaya re,
Main khud sapne mein kho gaya re mane bera na ke ho gaya re,
Location teri bhardi oye aur tere pyar ka root liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya,

O kit re tu aayi hai aur kit si tane jaana se,
Debate chalegi tere pe ib shuru kiya se gaana se,
Abhiyaan search tera jaari hai tane galti kardi bhaari se,
Ib chaapa padna tere pe kara Janhit bheta jari se,
Oye haani karak zehar tera aur galti te maine ghoot liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya,

Tu paue jitni dikikhan mein or bottle barga asar tera,
Re samajh kise ke aaya na isa kar diya se yo hashar mera,
Nu aage pache bohot ghani par dil tere pe aaya se,
Akhand taareef ki patar tu jab geet tere pe gaya hai,
Baaki to sab moh-maya se aur sabka bhanda foot liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya, 

Oye yaar tera full paapi hai na duji koi copy se,
Mai ek ekla antique su ya news aa ne bhi chaapi hai,
Re Dil te Dhanyawad karu meri zindagi mein jo aayi tu,
Ya saare raaji ho jange banja inki bharjayi tu,
Chal chhod jeans or top tera ja Mere naam ka suit liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya.

ओय लूट लिया र लूट लिया ओय दिन धोले तने लूट लिया ओय तू चंबल की डाकू से तने दिल धोले मै लूट लिया

मधुराज रेसिपी मसाले ऑर्डर कसे करायचे यासाठी हा विडिओ पहा
https://youtu.be/9Db_owqWJe4

Summer is on. So ice cream recipe is must. We already have seen few ice cream recipes. But in this recipe we are not using any cream, whipped cream or fresh cream, not even condensed milk or milk powder. You can make these ice creams easily with the ingredients easily available in your kitchen. These ice creams turn out really nice and tasty. This is a very easy and simple recipe. You can try this recipe at home and drop a comment for me. Do not forget to like, share and subscribe.

Ingredients:
• 1 1/2 litre full cream Milk
• 1/2 cup Sugar
• 3 tsp Corn flour
• 1/2 tsp G.M.S. powder (Optional)
• 2 tsp Milk 
For Dry Fruit Ice Cream
• 4~5 Almonds
• 4~5 Cashew nuts
• 2~3 drops Saffron essence
• Yellow food color (Optional)
• Few Pistachios slices
• Few Almonds slices
For Paan Ice Cream
• 1 tsp Fennel seeds
• Cardamom powder
• 1 tsp Gulkand
• 5 Betel leaves
• 2~3 tsp Khas syrup
• Few Tutti frutti
For Chocolate Ice Cream
• 2 tsp Cocoa powder
• A little Chocolate syrup
For Mango Ice Cream
• Mango pulp
• Chopped Mango
• Few Pistachios slices

Method:
• Heat up milk in a pan. 
• When milk begins to boil add sugar and mix well. 
• Take corn flour in a bowl and add G.M.S powder. 
• Adding G.M.S. powder is optional. You can skip it if you don’t want. 
• Add milk to make slurry and add this slurry into the boiling milk. 
• Mix well and boil well until the mixture thickens up really good for about 10 minutes. 
• Turn off the gas and let the mixture cool down completely. 
• Blend the mixture well with hand blender. 
• You can blend the mixture in mixer too. 
• Transfer the mixture into a plastic container and close the lid. 
• Transfer the container into freezer to set overnight. 
• Ice cream base is ready. 
• Take the container out of the freezer and rest it for about 10 minutes. 
• When the base softens a little cut it into pieces. 

For more Such Recipes

snippet.title: Roll Rida - Chinna feat. Vikas Badisa | Telugu Rap Music Video 2021
snippet.description:
Disclaimer: Life would be amazing and happy, if we have Chinna in everyone life and also not encouraging Child Labour in any manner !

#RollRida #Chinna #ChinnaMusicVideo

Chinna is all about that young kid who lives at our homes, and helps in our daily lives with all the tiny works we ask for !! This song is about him and his story.

Under Ajay Mysore Productions
Rap, Performed , Lyrics and Sung by Roll Rida
Directed by Shaan Abdul Wahab
Produced by Ajay Mysore
Music Programmed/Arranged, Hook Vocals by Vikas Badisa
DOP by Sreechith Vijayan Damodar
Choreography by Chitti Master
Edited by Sanal Rajj
Colorist by Selvin Varghese
Additional Programming by Kalyan
Titles by Amal Ganesh
Line Producer: Neela Chakravarthy
Photography by Sankhya Vamshi
Recording Engineers : Raam Gandikota, Masthan Vali
Mixed and Mastered by Abin Paul
Poster Design: Venkat and Swamy Kapardhi
Audio Label: Monkstar Music

Telugu Lyrics:

They call me chinna
idhe ma galli
e pani unna
cheppesei jaldi
kullamu kulla
untanu friendly
respect ichipuchuko
ledante lolli

They call me chinna
idhe ma galli
dimaag unna
maisamma talli
na fame chusthe
edusthav kulli
na jolikosthe
aithadi ne pelli..

(Hook)
 Chinna aak nak dinna aak nak Chinna aak nak dinna aak nak
 Takkaru takkaru takkaru knickeru 
Takkaru takkaru takkaru knickeru 
Takkaru takkaru takkaru knickeru 
Takkaru Takkaru baboi

neekosam.. body ottutha
kaalunokkutha
shopukellutha
samaan ethutha

pakka galli pilla information ichutha
battal jaadi kotti aarava veeti madtha pettutha

plate ethi ammo
pic kotti ammo
chai techi ammo
chettha ethi ammo

manchi neelu osthe..pipe petti neelu pattutha
appulodu intikosthe nuvvulevani chepputha

Chinnovaina gaani, adagangaane chei andisthav, 
saayaam tappa gaayam cheyyani nature needi ra

E pani aina gaani, kaadanakunda takkuna chesthav,
Nuv lekunte , ma e batkhul emai pothai ra

(Hook)
 Chinna aak nak dinna aak nak Chinna aak nak dinna aak nak
 Takkaru takkaru takkaru knickeru 
Takkaru takkaru takkaru knickeru 
Takkaru takkaru takkaru knickeru 
Takkaru Takkaru baboi


kuch bola.. kya bola.. kisko bola.. kya re thu
intha ochu hindi magar.. intha hindi nai aatha
po ra bhai chipkali.. phodunga tera matkali
delhi 6 masakali.. aja maari satakaali
nakko beta.. uko beta.. apna poora one side
ditch gitch dedo beta.. ichi padei full tight
char sous bees naatakalu.. nadvav eeda chal bhai
chinna ochindante.. bolo bolo ..good bye

(Hook)
 Chinna aak nak dinna aak nak Chinna aak nak dinna aak nak
 Takkaru takkaru takkaru knickeru 
Takkaru takkaru takkaru knickeru 
Takkaru takkaru takkaru knickeru 
Takkaru Takkaru baboi

snippet.title: Paatashaala - Yuvarathnaa(Kannada Video Song) | Puneeth Rajkumar | Santhosh Ananddram |Vijay Prakash
snippet.description:
Presenting 'PAATASHAALA', Full Video song, from Puneeth Rajkumar's Blockbuster Kannada film 'Yuvarathnaa', Directed by Santhosh Ananddram, Music by Thaman S, Produced by Vijay Kiragandur under Hombale Films. 

Visit 'Paatasala', and reminisce the place, that has laid out a foundation, for your today. With latest Kannada songs by Thaman S, as expressive and stirring, built with a large number of musicians and their instruments. 
The richness in this Kannada music shall remind you of your roots, unforgotten. 

If this isn't plenty enough? Subscribe to Hombale Films YouTube Channel for viewing many more of such Kannada new songs and videos. 
http://bit.ly/SubscribetoHombaleFilms

Music Director : Thaman S

snippet.title: Chal Uthh (चल उठ) | CA Anthem - Motivational Rap | Edu91 Ft. Kunal Singhani #CAAnthem #MyDreamCA
snippet.description:
#ChalUthh #MainBhiCA #MyDreamCA

This is dedicated to all the CA students! I know the times are tough, the situation has got completely out of hand, but now is the time to exercise EXTREME focus, calm, and perseverance.

Let's stay united with each other in this fight against the pandemic and prepare hard for our ultimate dream of becoming a CA

Good luck! Stay safe, take care of your health and the safety of your loved ones. We will meet again very soon when we all come out of this STRONGER and more RESILIENT!

Till then.. Seekhte rahey kyunki.. SEEKHNA bandh toh JEETNA bandh!

This video is powered by: https://www.edu91.org

Check Out Kunal's YT Channel - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9htEemZ1BXuTzU7xOTIaBg/

****************************

Lyrics:
Chal uth beta bistar toh chhod
tere sapne aage bhaag rahe zara tu bhi peeche daud 
chal utth la la bistar to chhod
Arjun ki aankhon se dekh tu apna
CA vaala goal
Chal uth na

aaj apne aap ko thoda push kar
shaitaan ko chhod aaj bhagwan ko thoda khush kar
jeetega padhayi ki ladayi jo tune chedi warna
kaise dekhega khud ko khud ki aankhon mein ghuskar

Chun li tune CA toh fir mehnat se kya darna
Padh le poori shiddat se fir jo bhi marzi karna
Ek baar padhne baith gaya toh itna saara padhna
k untaalis chaar bhi kaanpe aur na dena pade dharna

Warna jeene ni denge poochenge
Sab wo rishtedaar
Jinke khud k bacche paani mein milaake peete chaar

Par tu wo banda hai
Jisne na maani hai kabhie haar
Kamra band, phone side
Gussa paper pe nikaal
Aur 
Chal uth beta bistar toh chhod
tere sapne aage bhaag rahe zara tu bhi peeche daud 
chal utth la la bistar to chhod
Arjun ki aankhon se dekh tu apna
CA vaala goal
Chal uth na

aaj apne aap ko thoda push kar
shaitaan ko chhod aaj bhagwan ko thoda khush kar
jeetega padhayi ki ladayi jo tune chedi warna
kaise dekhega khud ko khud ki aankhon mein ghuskar

Na ismein Reservation chalti hai aur na hi Rishwat

bahaut priceless si cheez hai ye.. 

Ek heere ko chota banade itna keemti ye
launde karna chahte club mein party tera dream CA
langar ni lagra yahan pe tu jaake apna cheen CA
classes bhi ghar aa gayi par nawaab sahab ko neend chahiye

Uth k baith..aur  chup chaap padh, book ko khol
Jab lage k mujhse ho ni ra toh bhai tu khud ko bol
main toh kar lunga.. kar lunga main
apna khud ka ghar lunga main
maa ki dikkat sar lunga main
jo bhi ho jaaye padh lunga main
kaisa bhi aa jaaye paper
poora 116 bhar dunga main
CA ki degree lekar
apna sapna poora kar dunga main
100 pratishat dekar
bilkul chill fir result day par
jaise dhoni har one-day par
apna Monday, Sunday kar dunga main
jab sab pata hai toh fir padh le, ab tu dheeth na bann
"Naa" kehna seekh le, bekar mein itna sweet na bann
Aur jab lag jaaye
naam k aage dono akshar
tab cheekna par seekhte rehna
kyunki SEEKHNA BAND TOH JEETNA BAND

****************************

Rolling Credits

CAST AND CREW:

localized.title: Chal Uthh (चल उठ) | CA Anthem - Motivational Rap | Edu91 Ft. Kunal Singhani #CAAnthem #MyDreamCA
localized.description:
#ChalUthh #MainBhiCA #MyDreamCA

This is dedicated to all the CA students! I know the times are tough, the situation has got completely out of hand, but now is the time to exercise EXTREME focus, calm, and perseverance.

Let's stay united with each other in this fight against the pandemic and prepare hard for our ultimate dream of becoming a CA

Good luck! Stay safe, take care of your health and the safety of your loved ones. We will meet again very soon when we all come out of this STRONGER and more RESILIENT!

Till then.. Seekhte rahey kyunki.. SEEKHNA bandh toh JEETNA bandh!

This video is powered by: https://www.edu91.org

Check Out Kunal's YT Channel - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9htEemZ1BXuTzU7xOTIaBg/

****************************

Lyrics:
Chal uth beta bistar toh chhod
tere sapne aage bhaag rahe zara tu bhi peeche daud 
chal utth la la bistar to chhod
Arjun ki aankhon se dekh tu apna
CA vaala goal
Chal uth na

aaj apne aap ko thoda push kar
shaitaan ko chhod aaj bhagwan ko thoda khush kar
jeetega padhayi ki ladayi jo tune chedi warna
kaise dekhega khud ko khud ki aankhon mein ghuskar

Chun li tune CA toh fir mehnat se kya darna
Padh le poori shiddat se fir jo bhi marzi karna
Ek baar padhne baith gaya toh itna saara padhna
k untaalis chaar bhi kaanpe aur na dena pade dharna

Warna jeene ni denge poochenge
Sab wo rishtedaar
Jinke khud k bacche paani mein milaake peete chaar

Par tu wo banda hai
Jisne na maani hai kabhie haar
Kamra band, phone side
Gussa paper pe nikaal
Aur 
Chal uth beta bistar toh chhod
tere sapne aage bhaag rahe zara tu bhi peeche daud 
chal utth la la bistar to chhod
Arjun ki aankhon se dekh tu apna
CA vaala goal
Chal uth na

aaj apne aap ko thoda push kar
shaitaan ko chhod aaj bhagwan ko thoda khush kar
jeetega padhayi ki ladayi jo tune chedi warna
kaise dekhega khud ko khud ki aankhon mein ghuskar

Na ismein Reservation chalti hai aur na hi Rishwat

bahaut priceless si cheez hai ye.. 

Ek heere ko chota banade itna keemti ye
launde karna chahte club mein party tera dream CA
langar ni lagra yahan pe tu jaake apna cheen CA
classes bhi ghar aa gayi par nawaab sahab ko neend chahiye

Uth k baith..aur  chup chaap padh, book ko khol
Jab lage k mujhse ho ni ra toh bhai tu khud ko bol
main toh kar lunga.. kar lunga main
apna khud ka ghar lunga main
maa ki dikkat sar lunga main
jo bhi ho jaaye padh lunga main
kaisa bhi aa jaaye paper
poora 116 bhar dunga main
CA ki degree lekar
apna sapna poora kar dunga main
100 pratishat dekar
bilkul chill fir result day par
jaise dhoni har one-day par
apna Monday, Sunday kar dunga main
jab sab pata hai toh fir padh le, ab tu dheeth na bann
"Naa" kehna seekh le, bekar mein itna sweet na bann
Aur jab lag jaaye
naam k aage dono akshar
tab cheekna par seekhte rehna
kyunki SEEKHNA BAND TOH JEETNA BAND

****************************

Rolling Credits

CAST AND CREW:
Abhinav Singh, Abhishek, Abhishek Pandey, Adarsh Jaiswal, Ajay Sharma, Akshay Kumar Jha, Aman, Aman Mishra, Anu, Ashish Dubey, Bharat Bhushan, Hema Mukherjee, Jaggan, Junaid, Kamni, Kunal Jai Singhani, Lalit Chauhan, Maurya Agarwal, Mohit Gupta, Narabh Shah, Neeraj Arora, Nidhi, Nikunj Goyal, Pooja Gupta, Pooja Sharma, Prajat Singh, Prajjwal Soni, Prateeksha, Pratham Raheja, Renu, Sarthak Goyal, Shivangi, Shivansh, Shubham Mittal, Sidhanth Rajput, Subhash Ray, Sunil, Vikas Singla, Vrinda Chugh

Songwriter & Singer: Kunal Jai Singhani

Music Credits: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WbY9LxGkPyY 

Vocals Recorded by and at: Shubham Mittal at Artoday Studio - Delhi

Mixed and Mastered by: Shubham Mittal

VIDEO CREW:
Director: Utkarsh Bharat
1st Assistant Director: Shubham Mittal

Director of Photography (DOP): DD Verma

2nd unit DOP: Sanjay Kumar Jena

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 22 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

SUBSCRIBE to Sun Bangla YouTube channel - http://bit.ly/2kviBbJ

snippet.title: Hindi News Live: देश-दुनिया की इस वक्त की 100 बड़ी खबरें I Nonstop 100 I Top 100 I Apr 25, 2021
snippet.description:
Aaj Ki Taaja Khabar: राजधानी Delhi में Corona संक्रमण की रफ्तार तेजी से बढ़ती जा रही है. यहां शनिवार को बीते 24 घंटे में Corona के 24,103 नए मामले सामने आए. चिंता की बात ये रही बीते 24 घंटे में Delho में रिकॉर्ड 357 मौतें हुईं. ये अब तक का सबसे बड़ा आंकड़ा है. इतना ही नहीं, Delhi में पॉजिटिविटी रेट भी बढ़कर 332.27% हो गया. फिलहाल राजधानी में 93,080 मरीजों का इलाज चल रहा है.

snippet.title: Etela Rajender About Lock Down in Telangana | CM KCR Corona | KTR | Hyderabad Lock Down | ABN
snippet.description:
Etela Rajender About Lock Down in Telangana | CM KCR Corona | KTR | Hyderabad Lock Down | ABN
LIVE: లాక్ డౌన్ ఉంటుందా | Etela Rajender Exclusive Special LIVE Show | Telangana Lockdown | CM KCR Corona | ABN Debate
#EtelaRajender #Lockdown #Corona #CMKCR #Telangana #ABN
 The Telangana government on Tuesday announced a night curfew from 9pm to 5 is, till May 1 in a bid to control the second wave of the pandemic.
The orders came a day after the high court pulled up the state for not taking any action to curb the spread of the pandemic.
The state reported 5,926 new Covid cases, the highest ever in a single day, pushing the tally to over 3.61 lakh, while the toll rose to 1856 with 18 more fatalities.
The Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) has issued an order laying down guidelines for effective control of Covid-19 providing for states to impose local restrictions to prevent the spread of Covid-19 based on the assessment of the situation.
The various measures to control Covid-19 in the state have been reviewed.
"It is decided to introduce night curfew in the state for the period from 9pm to next day till May 1 as a further measure to prevent the spread of Covid-19," read the order issued by the chief secretary, Telangana Somesh Kumar.
Movement of all persons shall be prohibited from 9pm onwards except people engaged in essential services, state and central government officers on emergency duty, medical personnel, pregnant women, patients and persons coming from/going to airports, railway stations, bus stands on the production of a valid ticket.
The order specified that during the above mentioned period all offices, firms, shops, establishments restaurants etc. shall close at 8pm except hospitals, diagnostic labs, pharmacies and those dealing with supply of essential services such as print and electronic media, telecommunications, internet services, broadcasting and cable services, IT and IT-enabled services.
Delivery of all goods through e-commerce, petrol pumps, LPG, CNG, petroleum and gas outlets, power generation, transmission and distribution, water supply and sanitation, cold storage and warehousing services, private security services and production units or services which require continuous process will be allowed.  

For All Political and Latest News Updates Subscribe to #ABNTelugu https://bit.ly/2XHzSke

Manorama News
Manorama News, Kerala’s No. 1 news and infotainment channel, is a unit of MM TV Ltd., Malayala Manorama’s television venture. Manorama News was launched on August 17, 2006. The channel inherited the innate strengths of the Malayala Manorama daily newspaper and its editorial values: accuracy, credibility and fairness. It raised the bar in Malayalam television news coverage and stands for unbiased reporting, intelligent commentary and innovative programs. MM TV has offices across the country and overseas, including in major cities in Kerala, Metros and in Dubai, UAE.
